title: MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures
description: Emissive textures with JSON and OptiFine files. 1.16-1.20
body:
MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures Plugin
==================

![Emissive texture examples](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/emissive-plugin/blob/1.20/info/img/demo.gif?raw=true "Emissive Texture Examples")

Emissive Textures, Just Like OptiFine
--------
Add emissive textures to blocks, items, entities, block entities, and liquids without OptiFine. You can play with resource packs that normally require OptiFine ([`.properties` files](https://github.com/sp614x/optifine/blob/master/OptiFineDoc/doc/emissive.properties)), or you can create your own emissive resource pack with JSON files ([`.moremcmeta` files](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/core/wiki/User-Docs:-Emissive-Format)).

MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures is a client-sided mod, so you don't need to install it on a server.

Partial Transparency
--------
MoreMcmeta emissive overlays support partial transparency with the `transparency` option. Combined with MoreMcmeta's `smoothAlpha` animation parameter, you can animate emissive overlays to create blinking effects. See the [emissive documentation](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/core/wiki/User-Docs:-Emissive-Format) and the [animation documentation](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/core/wiki/User-Docs:-Animation-Format).

Download
--------
* [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/moremcmeta-emissive-fabric/files)
* [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive/versions)
* [GitHub](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/emissive-plugin/releases)

**You also need to download and install [MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta "MoreMcmeta") 4.0.0+.**

I am not responsible for any viruses, malware, etc. that may afflict your computer if you download from other sites.

Please help [StopModReposts](https://stopmodreposts.org/). Avoid reposting sites to protect yourself from malicious downloads, and ensure developers receive proper compensation for their hard work.

Sodium Compatibility
---------------------------
This plugin includes the Fabric rendering API as part of the mod jar. If you want to use Sodium, you also need to install [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) for Fabric rendering API compatibility.

Discuss MoreMcmeta
--------
Have a question, or want to show off a resource pack or plugin? Participate in MoreMcmeta's [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/MoreMcmeta/discussions) community!

Useful Links
-------
* [Community discussions](https://github.com/orgs/MoreMcmeta/discussions)
* [Issue tracker](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/emissive-plugin/issues)
* [Emissive format guide](https://github.com/MoreMcmeta/core/wiki/User-Docs:-Emissive-Format)
